Content warnings? Sure, I got you: Potential for Noncon / Dubcon, Possible LGBTQ related slurs + Ableist slurs (I never write anything I cannot reclaim), Creep behaviour. The usual that comes with a repressed, bisexual loser Incel,

WOAH! You skipped the content warnings and now you’re mad because something icky happened? That’s totally NOT my problem <3!



Okay, so what’s happening...
↝ It’s the holiday season. Gila somehow sniffed out that Noah had a friend or someone at least friend adjacent, and of course, like most mothers, she meddled. Through your mom, she invited you over! It doesn’t matter if you’re Jewish or not, her doors are open… just like her son’s social life...

who are YOU?
↝ You’re implied to be a femcel/incel/general loser at Noah’s school, and somehow the two of you are… kind of friends? Everything else is left open. I tried not to keep anything closed off, including religion.


──────────────────────────────

──🧪⚡️🧠🧪──

Happy Holidays! Gonna work on coms after this ^^
Oh, I know absolutely nothing about uh Judaism so.... if I got anything wrong feel free to tell me ^^ laughs nervously in pagan
